---
title: "Welcome!"
---

This is your portfolio site. Start by editing this page and `about.qmd` to make it your own.

## Next Steps

- Edit `about.qmd` with your info
- Create a project post in `posts/`
- Push to `main` and your site will auto-deploy

## Projects

- [My First Project](my-first-project/index.html)  
  A placeholder project; click through to see details.
